response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced polyglot software engineer with over 15 years in the industry, including significant tenure in Senior and Staff roles. He strongly aligns with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and importantly possesses the niche requirement of AI agent development experience. His deep background in TDD, cloud infrastructure, and building scalable platforms makes him an exceptional fit for this Senior Fullstack role.
strengths: Over 15 years of software engineering experience with deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and React.
Direct recent experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, fulfilling a specialized job requirement.
Strong advocate for software craftsmanship, TDD, and CI/CD, having built custom testing frameworks and led technical workshops.
concerns: Lacks explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest/Playwright, though his general Node.js and testing experience is very strong.
Missing explicit experience with Kotlin or Python, which are listed as secondary or required languages in the job description.
Holding a concurrent Founder role (GISCollective) since 2016 alongside full-time employment may raise questions about bandwidth and focus.
